name: Compare and Apply
tagline: Teach the distinction by holding two ideas in view at the same time and then applying it.

generation_guidance.emphasis: surface the decision points between the ideas
avoid: practice that does not depend on the distinction

best_for: chemistry contrasts, biology comparisons, and civics distinctions
analytical learners who benefit from explicit criteria
lessons where choosing correctly depends on noticing a difference
not_ideal_for: single-concept introductions with no meaningful rival idea
